TimeOfDay_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "1EBF650D465318400E4971A6449E3288", "You've entered the underground of the planet in an unconventional way!

Did you intend to do this, and skip the tutorial?

If so, continue on - if not, consider returning to the surface and entering the caverns as directed by the tutorials, or you will miss important information on how to play the game!")
